title: Serene-Seasons HUD
description: A feature-rich Serene Seasons HUD for tracking sub-season progress, climate data, and crop fertility with a built-in snap-to-grid editor.
body:
SeasonHUD – The ultimate Serene Seasons Companion

SeasonHUD is a lightweight and highly customizable HUD overlay for Minecraft 1.19.2. It bridges the gap between immersion and information by displaying essential seasonal and climatic data directly on your screen.

✨ Core Features

- 📅 Advanced Time Tracking: Displays the current day, precise sub-season progress (%), and a countdown of remaining days until the next season change.
- 🌡️ Real-Time Climate Data: Shows the exact biome temperature (in Celsius) and humidity levels.
 
- 🌱 Smart Fertility Indicator: Features a dynamic icon (Poppy for fertile / Dead Bush for infertile) to signal if crops can grow in the current season and biome.
  
-  🌦️ Weather Integration: Quickly check if it's currently raining or clear.
  
- 🎮 In-Game Editor: Move and scale the HUD with a visual editor. Includes a 4-pixel snap-to-grid feature for perfect alignment.
  
- 🎨 Full RGB Customization: Personalize the colors for every season and the info line via the config file.

🛠️ Requirements & Compatibility

- Minecraft Version: 1.19.2
  
- Mod Loader: Forge
  
- Required Dependency: [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons/version/8.1.0.24)
  
- Performance: Highly optimized for low-end systems and APUs.
